subject: Project Management
title: Kanban in Marketing
description: A quick, practical guide to Kanban in Marketing.

hook.text: Marketing teams juggle campaigns, content, events, and social media. Kanban brings order.

buildup.text: A marketing Kanban board might have: Ideas → Planned → In Progress → Review → Published.

discovery.text: WIP limits stop marketers from starting ten campaigns and finishing none.

twist.text: Creative teams feared Kanban would kill spontaneity. Instead, it freed them from chaos.

climax.text: Kanban gives creative teams structure without rigidity — the sweet spot for marketing.

quiz.question: Why does Kanban work well for marketing teams?
options: It provides structure without rigidity for creative work
It eliminates the need for marketing plans
